events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary singer-songwriter and former Beatle, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Milestone
angles.copy: Celebrating a true icon today! Sir Paul McCartney hits 84, still making music and headlines. What's your go-to Macca track, solo or with the Fabs?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Melodies
angles.copy: Happy 65th to the incredible Alison Moyet! From Yazoo to her stellar solo career, that voice is simply unmistakable. What's your favourite from her?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for his smooth vocals and timeless hits, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it you we're looking for? It is! Lionel Richie turns 77 today. Get ready to dance on the ceiling to some of his greatest hits.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Iconic American singer Cyndi Lauper, famous for her distinctive voice and vibrant style, celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Time to celebrate! The one and only Cyndi Lauper is 73 today. Her music and style truly broke the mould. What's your top Cyndi track?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, the iconic singer-songwriter who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. His legacy of extraordinary music lives on. What's the George Michael song that means the most to you?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who died on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music and artistry continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite MJ moment?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace and Love, Ringo!
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Keep on drumming, Ringo. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic beat?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! His guitar riffs are truly out of this world. What's your favourite Queen song thanks to his magic?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger Still Rolling
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 today, proving that rock and roll truly keeps you young. What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched 45 years ago today, on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV's 45th
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV changed the game! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' ushered in a new era. What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago today, on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your standout track from this legendary debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival turns 57
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair began 57 years ago today, on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the iconic Woodstock Festival kicked off! Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. Which artist would you have loved to see there?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley, 49 years on from his passing. His music continues to shake, rattle, and roll the world. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the iconic frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders' Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her fierce talent and distinctive voice have given us some incredible anthems. What's your top Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a successful solo artist, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for Liam
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Happy birthday to Liam Gallagher, the unmistakable voice behind so many anthems. What's your favourite moment from his career?

events.title: iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago today, on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: 25 Years of iPod
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since the first iPod dropped? It truly put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed how we listened to music forever. What was on your first iPod?
